## Summary

Describe the purpose and scope of this pull request.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Scientific clarification
- [ ] Numerical validation
- [ ] Test or CI improvement
- [ ] Breaking change

## Scientific status

Where applicable, classify the affected statement or result:

- [ ] Mathematical identity or derived result
- [ ] Numerically verified result
- [ ] Empirical claim
- [ ] Research hypothesis
- [ ] Conjecture
- [ ] Phenomenological interpretation
- [ ] Not applicable

## Validation performed

List the commands, tests, benchmarks, or numerical checks executed.

```text
py -m pytest -q
```

## Reproducibility

- [ ] The change includes or updates tests.
- [ ] Numerical parameters and assumptions are documented.
- [ ] Random seeds are fixed where applicable.
- [ ] Public API changes are documented.
- [ ] No unsupported scientific claim was introduced.

## Compatibility

- [ ] Existing public aliases remain functional.
- [ ] Documentation examples were tested.
- [ ] The change is compatible with supported Python versions.

## Additional notes

Include limitations, unresolved questions, or follow-up work.
